content: Please tell me Leigh is even slightly useful I have rolled this woman four times while trying to get other characters
Any purpose at all will do
She is uh
Niche
Her kit is nice, but her stat is terrible
Like, half of what other awakers have
You use her as a filler most of the times
Me chillin with my 06 Agrippa, day 4 btw
Aggripa works well with castor
For that stalling power
I do like her

Really, how? I hv him from the selector bt dk how to play him yet
I js use her for embryo gen with thais then Helot mouchette bt e0 mouchette is starting to fall off real fast, Also idk how to play Jenkins will do research
Aggripa exalt grants alert
Alert basically increases every instance of shielding you get
Castor can hold plumes in hand to generate shield
So let's say you have 6 alert and 3 plumes
You are getting additional 18 shield
Doesn't sound alot, but the alert you gain from aggripa exalt is permanent
So you could stack it up in a few turns

Ok......so agrippa, castor, winkle & jenkins
I'll put aigis on my main team instead
Late game she sees niche usages in specific comps
More valued then doorstain honestly
I would run leigh on the last slot for babies generation
Well if I ever get there, uh
yay

Team atm. Helot’s warming the bench until I can start building with either Aigis or Faint (I have both, but neither built up at all)

I’ve heard strike stuff doesn’t really scale which is a shame since Mouchette’s doing all the damage atm and I have no replacement. Yeah, the needle should be on her and I plan to move it, but I lack anything good to put on Lotan so w/e.
As a new player, what should I be looking to do?
Where should I be going.

once per enemy

can’t stop myself
We already have alot of end game content clears with somewhat low investment mouchette, so no need to worry about that
For mouchette comp, can just refer to the speedrun guide

Mouchette can instantly delete the branches that the trees spawns, just Exalt > Shining Tornado > spam Strikes (its much easier with Advance Relics, prio is Fleeting Beauty > Eerie Claw > Antique Puzzle > Ivory Raven Beak)

content: Helot is her best support, but you can make her work with any support really
Is there any particular wheel(s) that stand drastically above others to shovel your timeloops in to?
There's a column for Speedruns here
It's typically recommended to select a Limited Awakener to use as your Carry and then pull the designated Standard Banners for their Supports
Best ones atm is Mouchette E3 + Lily WoD w/ Thais E2 + her own WoD, then throw in a Helot with a choice of either Helot E0/1 + Aigis
Handspace, Horla, Tulu, etc
Ah, so Aigis is a good inclusion.
Well that’s remarkably convenient as I already have E3 Mouchette and I’ll be putting the wheel on her soon, Thais is resisting my attempts to E her but we’ll get there
Helot and Aigis are both E0 but idk we’ll figure that one out
She'll always be a good addition, she has an one time guaranteed stun per once per enemy if you use her Exalt to Devour an Embryo in your Hand
Which wheel is Tulus?
Aigis will just take a moment
Oh Hymn I imagine.
So in other words I’m already set completely by coincidence
Awesome
I accidentally made a speedrun team! Nice!
Helot is better staying at E0 imo, because her E1 grants you a Card called Irregular Form that will always be stuck in your Hand until its casted because it has the Retain modifier attached to it
Oh really? Well that’s annoying.
Yh, I am definitely not a fan of it
if I stun the ch7 boss using aigis when its aboutta spawn its 5 mfers, will it jist delay their spawning or will it skip them and go to next phase?
We all await the day you can turn enlightens off. My Horla haunts me.
delay
Yh, new players like us are eating good with the addition of GMurphy followed by Mouchette to carry us in the Story Mode
Honestly part of why Lotan’s still on the team is that her three cost that reduces to zero is very useful to copy with Thais when I don’t have the mana to copy and use Mouchette’s nuke

Since it's on demand strike
But eh
0 cost hit three times is just, a lot of extra damage
It's up to you
im about to fight everyone that dont like horlas e2

Plus I can’t upgrade Aigis yet.
Got to wait for next week…
I just wish that instead of having me select between 4 of her Cards, it just lets me search for base Strikes directly and reduce the Cost by 1 instead so that it essentially it becomes free to Cast
I don't like that I can't turn it off. Most of the time I don't mind it but when I am already playing Clem+Castor my retains start getting problematic.
Her Enlightenments are all very useful, because it gives you lots of Vulnerable Applications
im about to fight u
Fair point really
Smash
Few suggested to the devs for ability to turn off enlightens
This is mainly for guide makers
But it's nice qol in general
Just hope they don't somehow paywall it like with turn rewinds
Like have it cost 100 - 300k Gold to turn them off, and from then its permanent to toggle between
It's really Dirge. If I am using Clem the times I will use Dirge are incredibly low but it sticks around.
Have more faith in them
So far I’ve mostly just had Thais spit vulnerable at their faces but I would like Aigis, yes.
Means I’m less of a one turn wonder.
Win instantly or die and all.
If anything, it's the other way around
You'd arguably be more of an one turn wonder running Aigis with key Enlightenments
Since you'll be popping Vulnerable very often
Yeah, that sounds about right
And when the going gets tough
Hey she can stun enemies.
Two turn wonder.
You can switch Aigis for Faint instead
I got Faint recently, if I am reading this correctly her job is just life support revive duty.
Is that about correct?

Better for longer drawn out fights because she has lots of Death Resistance stacking and if you trigger it in a Battle your 3-Cost will cast Twice so you'll receive double Healing + Shielding, it's also nice that her 2-Cost will grant you permanent Strength + temporarily reduce Enemy Strength, her Shield will also give permanent Counter
Yeah, that's about right
Just throw in Counter + Strength stacking too
It's just that she's not good in either of those Categories, she's more of a Jack of all Trades in the Support Category
With all of the Utility that she provides for you
Sounds good.
Yep
I’ll build Aigis and Faint both then.
Fsfs, that sounds like a good plan
Aigis first since I have to roll for Faint and that’ll take longer.
Can have Aigis for mob Fights + instant Boss Fights and Faint for the final Stages of a Chapter
Aigis admittedly might take a few weeks but w/e
For now, Lotan, enjoy your ten minutes of fame.
They're both solid Units at E0
Perfectly serviceable

Ok I have a really dumb question. If I am supposed to rush thru the blue banner, get important units then lock myself in the wheel jail, how do I get dupes of unused awakers to maximize the Origin?

they don't expire, so you can just wait and choose someone later when you are trying to build 5+ dtide teams and are sure of what you want. You also have helot e3 so you should be set on your mouchette caro main team for a while.

Unlocking more posses directly boosts the stats you get from relics and orisons

If you want to be ultra sweat about it you can wait until the game gets more than 50 posse in order to pick and choose which posse are in your random pool, but the game currently only has 44 posses and it genuinely doesn't matter to restrict yourself like this

you get standard awakeners by missing on limited banners

but also, don't ONLY pull blue, that advice is pretty outdated nowadays. I suggest pulling on all the banners so you have a variety of units to build teams with

Helot is a really nice support with mouchette. She can give you more strikes, and her exalt gives you a multiplier on all strikes played during that turn. Apply vuln + helot exalt then watch everything explode.

From your main team I think the swap would probably be salvador for helot. Not that he is bad, its more just with mouchette you are kind of more building towards burst damage rather than sustain with the team.

Castor is good but at E0 he needs to pair with a dps like Jenkin. If u have a dps to pair he's a good addition (I picked him). If you want a great dps and willing to wait, pick Kat and wait for her rerun (god awful long) and get her E3

The realm still counts as pure if mixed with Chaos, that's one of its gimmicks

and why i don't see the effects of chaos? one character per team isn't enough to trigger the effects?

The effects of pure Chaos are only active when you have 4 Chaos awakeners in the team
Otherwise you get Chaos resonance, which is +100% Death Resistance and an additional effect, depending on the realm you're mixing it with

Mouch to E3, one copy of Lily's wheel

mouchette to e3

if you don't already have thais wheel, lily wheel, tulu wheel, try to get 1 of each

your lineup looks fine, you can pull for e3 wheels for now, or save 60 pure cores for gramona
So 1 lily wheel then mouch e3 then thais wheel?
Thais Wheel > Lily wheel > Mouch to E3
You can grab Tulu wheel if you want before Mouch
Thais wheel is the best wheel in the game
Lily wheel is very good for low investment Mouchette
Tulu wheel is good for anyone who likes Aliemus

Does rolling the wheels follow the same rule as characters that after 2 missed rng 3rd is guaranteed?

No, miss one ssr and next ssr will be guaranteed.
30 pulls soft pity with 1/2 chance instead of 1/3. 60 pulls hard pity
It's a lot easier to get wheel
This is for limited wheel
Standard wheel follow the same 2 miss rule

stupid new player question. is the "select an awakener to gain aliemus and crit rate" effect the "Devour" effect the card is referring to?
Devour is when a caro unit uses exalt, it happens automatically
nope, two different things.
what does Devour do, then?
Depends on the character
They have specialized effects
oh okay, that makes sense, thanks. sorry the text is a little ambiguous sometimes
Helot for example draws strike cards

You can either use the embryo like a regular card and it will give 30 aliemus and +10 crit rate (this is good). Alternatively, using a caro character's exalt while you have an embryo in hand will trigger devour and give you a bonus effect on their exalt (this is often also good).

assuming no equips?

Here is the top I made:
1. Castor is the best on E0
good shields good debuff that does good damage
Castor is cool
2. Clementine, overall a great support, can heal, give str and has a special debuff on exalt that either makes enemies take more damage, or do less damage, you choose which one to apply, overall, Clem is cool
3. Gdoll, the Doll: inferno, I mean. If you didn't know, on this street, alts of chars we call G + *insert the name of the character*, anyways. Gdoll is like Clementine for the role, gives good buffs, but also provides aliemus, and if you want to do a poison team, recommend picking her, lol
4. Corpo gives nice shields and tentacle damage, you could pick for your aequor team
5. Pickman, I mean... He good, but for newbies I don't think he is THAT good, he is a support for exalt teams in specific, overall a good unit, but you could get him later and not loose much tbh
6. Pollux, Kathi and Dorestain.
Dps chars that you could pick but rn you can feel free not to, you gotta get supports first, they will give much more help and overall are futureproof and lalala
Over all:
Castor > Gdoll ≥ Clementine(both are equally good, but you should pick Gdoll if you feel like poison is your way of living) > Corpo > Pickman > everybody else
